description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a stylish urban individual with a distinctive look. The figure features a voluminous fur-collared jacket over a fitted top, paired with a short skirt and tight leggings. Both arms appear to be metallic or robotic, suggesting a cybernetic or futuristic theme. The person wears large sunglasses and has a bold, swept-back hairstyle. Footwear consists of sturdy, heeled boots, and the overall stance is confident and upright. The combination of fashion-forward clothing and cybernetic limbs gives the figure a unique, modern appearance suitable for a dynamic city environment.
description: A confident urban adult with a fur-collared jacket, cybernetic arms, sunglasses, and heeled boots, exuding a futuristic style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fur-collared jacket, sunglasses, cybernetic arms, and confident stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the swept-back hairstyle, and the metallic arm.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the fur collar, hairstyle details, and the fitted nature of the outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the other metallic arm and the side profile of the boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted top with fur-collared jacket, short skirt, and tight leggings
